purpose: Hydrogel Phase 3 TMEM145 tail retool AF3 batch. Phase 2 short-peptide tails (11-12 aa mis-attributed to aa 1669-1680, actually STRC aa 1454-1465 — a NON-contact region) failed TMEM145 gate at ipTM 0.37-0.39 across 3 candidates. Phase 3 uses CORRECT GOLD-zone sequences spanning the two dominant canonical contact clusters (aa 1669-1680 + aa 1692-1707). Three tail lengths tested: 51, 71, 91 aa (manufacturing SPPS-feasible).

phase1_design_bug.claim_in_phase1_note: native 12-mer AEDLPEPVPNCA derived from STRC aa 1669-1680
phase1_design_bug.implication: Phase 2 TMEM145 FAIL at ipTM 0.37-0.39 is NOT evidence against dual-interface architecture — wrong epitope was tested. First honest test of the hypothesis begins with this Phase 3 batch.

canonical_contact_clusters_GOLD_zone.cluster_1_1603-1607: 5 residues; not included in any extended tail
canonical_contact_clusters_GOLD_zone.cluster_4_1669-1680: 12 residues DOMINANT; in all extended tails
canonical_contact_clusters_GOLD_zone.cluster_5_1692-1707: 16 residues SECOND DOMINANT; in all extended tails

tail_1660_1710.description: 51 aa minimal; clusters 4+5 with 10 aa flank each side

tail_1640_1710.description: 71 aa +loop cap; clusters 3+4+5 (adds aa 1648-1651 loop cap)

tail_1620_1710.description: 91 aa wide; clusters 2+3+4+5 (adds aa 1630-1638 second ARM anchor)

hydrogel_tail_1660_1710_x_tmem145.description: Extended STRC-derived tail × TMEM145 full. 51 aa minimal; clusters 4+5 with 10 aa flank each side. Tail length 51 aa, total complex 544 aa. Isolated tail test (no RADA16/EAK16 scaffold, no WH2 actin-binder) to separately validate the retooled TMEM145 interface before Phase 3b full-construct fusion.
hydrogel_tail_1660_1710_x_tmem145.success_criteria: ipTM >= 0.50 (Phase 3 gate, same as Phase 2). Target: beat Phase 2 native 11-mer baseline (ipTM 0.39) by >=0.10. Aspirational: match Ultra-Mini solo × TMEM145 baseline (ipTM 0.43).
hydrogel_tail_1660_1710_x_tmem145.hypothesis_impact: pass (any candidate) -> Phase 3b: fuse winning tail back to RADA16-WH2 scaffold; re-run full-construct × TMEM145 AF3. If Phase 3b preserves ipTM at 0.50+, hypothesis #9 B -> A. fail (all three) -> Option A (longer tail) exhausted; move to Option B (helical mimetic / miniprotein) or Option C (different epitope, e.g. aa 1630-1638 cluster 2 alone).

hydrogel_tail_1640_1710_x_tmem145.description: Extended STRC-derived tail × TMEM145 full. 71 aa +loop cap; clusters 3+4+5 (adds aa 1648-1651 loop cap). Tail length 71 aa, total complex 564 aa. Isolated tail test (no RADA16/EAK16 scaffold, no WH2 actin-binder) to separately validate the retooled TMEM145 interface before Phase 3b full-construct fusion.
hydrogel_tail_1640_1710_x_tmem145.success_criteria: ipTM >= 0.50 (Phase 3 gate, same as Phase 2). Target: beat Phase 2 native 11-mer baseline (ipTM 0.39) by >=0.10. Aspirational: match Ultra-Mini solo × TMEM145 baseline (ipTM 0.43).
hydrogel_tail_1640_1710_x_tmem145.hypothesis_impact: pass (any candidate) -> Phase 3b: fuse winning tail back to RADA16-WH2 scaffold; re-run full-construct × TMEM145 AF3. If Phase 3b preserves ipTM at 0.50+, hypothesis #9 B -> A. fail (all three) -> Option A (longer tail) exhausted; move to Option B (helical mimetic / miniprotein) or Option C (different epitope, e.g. aa 1630-1638 cluster 2 alone).

hydrogel_tail_1620_1710_x_tmem145.description: Extended STRC-derived tail × TMEM145 full. 91 aa wide; clusters 2+3+4+5 (adds aa 1630-1638 second ARM anchor). Tail length 91 aa, total complex 584 aa. Isolated tail test (no RADA16/EAK16 scaffold, no WH2 actin-binder) to separately validate the retooled TMEM145 interface before Phase 3b full-construct fusion.
hydrogel_tail_1620_1710_x_tmem145.success_criteria: ipTM >= 0.50 (Phase 3 gate, same as Phase 2). Target: beat Phase 2 native 11-mer baseline (ipTM 0.39) by >=0.10. Aspirational: match Ultra-Mini solo × TMEM145 baseline (ipTM 0.43).
hydrogel_tail_1620_1710_x_tmem145.hypothesis_impact: pass (any candidate) -> Phase 3b: fuse winning tail back to RADA16-WH2 scaffold; re-run full-construct × TMEM145 AF3. If Phase 3b preserves ipTM at 0.50+, hypothesis #9 B -> A. fail (all three) -> Option A (longer tail) exhausted; move to Option B (helical mimetic / miniprotein) or Option C (different epitope, e.g. aa 1630-1638 cluster 2 alone).

how_to_submit: AlphaFold Server Import-from-JSON for each file. Daily limit 20; this batch uses 3. Seed 42 for consistency with prior Hydrogel batches.

decision_rules.any_tail_passes_50: Phase 3b: fuse winning tail back to RADA16-WH2 scaffold + WH2 actin-binder. Re-run full-construct × TMEM145 + G-actin trimer (3 more jobs). If Phase 3b preserves interface -> hypothesis #9 B -> A.
decision_rules.progressive_pattern: If 51 aa < 71 aa < 91 aa (monotonic improvement), extend further to 100-120 aa (approaching miniprotein scale, SPPS becomes expensive but still feasible).
decision_rules.plateau_pattern: If all three tails cluster near Ultra-Mini baseline 0.43, the ceiling is the isolated peptide nature — move to Option B (helical mimetic scaffold) to stabilise binding conformation.
decision_rules.all_fail: Option A exhausted. Move to Option B (miniprotein scaffold with stapled binding loop) or Option C (cluster 2 aa 1630-1638 epitope alone, different binding site).
